subcodes.first_line: Your letter was received, and in the Most Great Prison an answer hath been sent down from the Ancient King. Blessed be the eye that seeth and the ear that hearkeneth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه شما رسید و در سجن اعظم جواب آن از مالک قدم نازل طوبی لعین رات و لاذن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement
